vars.pitch: MedScribe is an AI medical scribing app for US dermatology clinics, billed monthly per provider.

lessons.lesson: Pick a specialty Epic and athena are slow to bundle into.
Sign multi-year contracts before incumbents copy.
Build an integration moat that survives a bundled-scribing release.

top_risks.summary: Sign multi-year contracts before EHRs bundle scribing.
top_risks.applies_because: Pitch sells per-provider monthly scribing, the same shape Epic absorbed when ScribeTech died.

top_risks.summary: Pick a specialty EHRs are slow to bundle into.
top_risks.applies_because: Pitch targets dermatology specifically — defensibility hinges on this choice.
